# Issue Drafts - Website SMAN 2 Pangkalanbun

These drafts are prepared for manual creation because automated issue creation failed due to GitHub authentication.

## 1) [Atomic] Bootstrap SMAN 2 Pangkalanbun site target

Establish local dev baseline, setup bypass verification, and bootstrap documentation.

## 2) [Atomic] Create core collections: pages, news, announcements

Define collection schemas and editorial flow for initial public information domains.

## 3) [Atomic] Enforce CI quality gates for AI-native workflow

Align lint/typecheck/test gates and branch merge expectations.

## 4) [Atomic] Define custom plugin scaffolding standard

Create repeatable plugin conventions for settings, hooks, and API route safety.

## 5) [Atomic] Implement AW Non-Commercial compliance documentation

Integrate license-safe release and contributor compliance checks.
